## 6. Evaluation Criteria

Proposals will be evaluated on the following weighted criteria:

| Criterion | Weight |
|-----------|--------|
| {{ criterion_1 }} | {{ weight_1 }}% |
| {{ criterion_2 }} | {{ weight_2 }}% |
| {{ criterion_3 }} | {{ weight_3 }}% |
| {{ criterion_4 }} | {{ weight_4 }}% |
| **Total** | **100%** |

---

## 7. Required Proposal Structure

Proposals must include the following sections in order:

1. Executive summary (max 1 page)
2. Understanding of requirements
3. Proposed solution
4. Proposed methodology and implementation approach
5. Proposed timeline
6. Team structure and key personnel
7. Pricing
8. Client references (minimum 2)
9. Assumptions and exclusions
10. Appendices (optional)

---

- File format: {{ file_format }}

- Deadline: {{ submission_deadline }}

Late submissions will not be considered.

Questions must be submitted by {{ questions_deadline }} to {{ contact_email }}.
